title: FrameExtensionBox
description: FrameExtensionBox: Fragment containing a curve enclosing the portion of a mullion cross section that will be extruded by Facade_Engine method that changes mullion profile depth.

BoundingBoxCurve.description: ICurve representing the mullion bounding box. ICurve: The interface for all one-dimensional geometrical objects.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
